prayer:
Approach the mighty Manticore with invocations to the Omnissiah, beseeching its Machine Spirit to prepare for loading.
Anoint the breeches and feeders of the Manticore with sacred oils, purging any impurities.
Commence the loading rite, sliding sanctified shells into the Manticore's voracious heart.
Chant the Canticle of Replenishment as diagnostics confirm the Machine Spirit's harmonious vigil.
Seal the chambers with binaric blessings, readying the Manticore for the Emperor's fury.

user_prompt: Consecrate the Contemptor Dreadnought before consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the ancient Contemptor Dreadnought, invoking the Omnissiah to stir its slumbering Machine Spirit.
Circumambulate the sarcophagus, reciting the Litany of Consecration upon its armoured form.
Anoint dreadnought servos and cogitators with chrism, performing the consecration to bind soul and steel.
Test the Machine Spirit's response through ritual activation, ensuring eternal vigilance.
Conclude with the Benediction of the Motive Force, sanctifying the Contemptor Dreadnought anew.

prayer:

Verify sterility through noospheric auspex, beseeching the Machine Spirit's unblemished return.
Seal the potentia coil with wards of faith, restored to flawless potency.

Affirm the helispex engine's revival through auspex rites, praising the God-Machine's mercy.

prayer:
Gather before the torpedo tube, intoning the Reset Canticle to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Cycle the torpedo tube's locks with sanctified keys, initiating the reset sequence.
Flush residual propellants from the torpedo tube, anointing barrels with purity unguents.
Reboot cogitator engrams of the torpedo tube, verifying the Machine Spirit's refreshed purity.
Conclude the reset with Omnissiah's invocation, arming the torpedo tube for void-war.

Approach the las-cutter with humble mechadendrites, beseeching purification of its crystalline heart.

Polish focusing lenses of the las-cutter with micro-abrasives blessed by the Omnissiah.
Recharge under noospheric vigilance, awakening the Machine Spirit purified and keen.
Test the las-cutter's beam in sacred void, hailing its sanctified incision.

Enter the manufactorum's halls with reverence, invoking Machine Spirits for the loading rite.
Align conveyor servos of the manufactorum, anointing them prior to loading.
Commence loading of sacred components into the manufactorum's forges, chanting production litanies.
Monitor the Machine Spirit's throughput via auspex, ensuring Omnissiah-blessed efficiency.
Seal the manufactorum's cycles with final blessings, prolific in the Emperor's name.
